things.name: The Grenadines by Boat
things.description: Charter a yacht or catamaran to the 32 islands and cays of the Grenadines

things.name: La Soufriere Volcano
things.description: Hike to the 1234m active volcano summit with dramatic crater lakes

things.name: Tobago Cays Marine Park
things.description: UNESCO protected coral reef with sea turtles - the jewel of the Grenadines

things.name: Botanic Gardens
things.description: Oldest botanic gardens in the Western Hemisphere - established 1765

things.name: Bequia Island
things.description: Charming whaling island with Port Elizabeth harbour - the jewel of the northern Grenadines

things.name: Fort Charlotte
things.description: 1806 hilltop fort with 360-degree views of Kingstown and the Grenadines

things.name: Vermont Nature Trail
things.description: Rainforest trail with endemic St Vincent Amazon parrots

things.name: Mesopotamia Valley
things.description: Lush fertile valley with banana plantations and arrowroot fields

things.name: Mustique Island
things.description: Exclusive island retreat beloved by royalty and celebrities

things.name: Black Point Tunnel
things.description: Hand-dug 1815 tunnel through the rock by enslaved workers - a historic feat
